name: quirgs
description: Governance-first AI compliance skills for Claude, from quirgs.com.

plugins.name: quirgs-compliance
plugins.description: All seven governance-first AI compliance skills in one install: EU AI Act classification, NIST AI RMF checkpoints, ISO 42001 audit prep, HITL gating, PII exposure checks, incident response logging, and AI transparency writing.

plugins.name: quirgs-publish
plugins.description: Bundle — one install, eight music publishing skills: royalty reconciliation, catalog metadata hygiene, DDEX/PRO registration extraction, sync licensing pitch generation, AI provenance logging, platform compliance gating, quarterly catalog harvesting, and a weekly publishing OS orchestrator. Installs as a set; copy any single skill out of the bundle to run it standalone.

plugins.name: ai-transparency-writer
plugins.description: Draft EU AI Act Article 13 transparency disclosures, user-facing AI notices, and model cards.

plugins.name: eu-ai-act-classifier
plugins.description: Classify an AI system's risk tier under the EU AI Act and surface the legal obligations that apply.

plugins.name: hitl-compliance-gate
plugins.description: Insert human-in-the-loop checkpoints into AI workflows and map them to EU AI Act, ISO 42001, and NIST AI RMF controls.

plugins.name: incident-response-logger
plugins.description: Log and triage AI incidents against EU AI Act Article 62 reporting thresholds and NIST 800-61 response phases.

plugins.name: iso-42001-audit-prep
plugins.description: Prepare for an ISO/IEC 42001 AI management system audit: clause coverage, Annex A controls, and evidence collection.

plugins.name: nist-ai-rmf-checkpoint
plugins.description: Run an AI system through the NIST AI RMF 1.0 Govern, Map, Measure, and Manage functions and surface gaps.

plugins.name: pii-exposure-checker
plugins.description: Audit AI data pipelines for PII exposure under GDPR and EU AI Act Article 10, with risk ratings and remediation actions.
